content.text:
## Summary
Revision pass completed successfully. Three scenes revised with focus on prose tightening and dialogue naturalization.

## Quality Signals
- Word count reductions achieved (avg 8% per scene)
- Voice consistency maintained across all revised scenes
- Dialogue tags simplified effectively

## Concerns
- act1-sc02: One continuity reference to "the letter" may need checking against act1-sc01 changes
- act2-sc01: Metaphor in paragraph 3 may clash with established motif taxonomy

## Recommendation
Ready to merge. Minor continuity check recommended but not blocking.

## Fixable Items
- [ ] reference/scenes.csv: update word_count for act1-sc01 (was 2400, now ~2200)
- [ ] reference/scenes.csv: update word_count for act1-sc02 (was 1800, now ~1650)
